description: Deal Filter Wiring & Type Safety. (1) DealFilters state (filters) captured in page but NEVER passed to trpc.opportunity.list.useQuery — ownerId and dateRange selections have no effect on kanban view data (F-10, deals/(list)/page.tsx:214,226). (2) 'More Filters' button has no onClick handler (F-11, DealFilters.tsx). (3) Owner filter only has 2 hardcoded options: 'All Deals' and 'My Deals' — no dynamic user list (F-12). (4) transformDeals uses loose Record<string,unknown> casting at API boundary instead of typed response (F-19, types.ts:102-119). Wire filters to API query params; add server-side owner filter with user list; type-safe API response handling. Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 3, 8.

wiring_complete.target: Filter selections affect displayed data; owner list from API

notes: Deal/opportunity domain wiring audit finding. See docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md.
